violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (slicer) was observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. PIC took out of service to be washed and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/13/2025

Noodles packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/13/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. PIC took out of service to be washed and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/06/2025

Bean sprouts were observed held at 49 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC discarded. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/06/2025
Inspector observed various pastry items without labels. Items were embargoed. New Violation. Correct By: 11/06/2025

Noodles packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. New Violation. Correct By: 11/06/2025

The door to the outside, located in the back, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 11/20/2025
Various items were observed stored on the floor in the basement and walk-in freezer. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 11/06/2025
Inspector observed single service items stored on the floor in the basement and meat cutting area. PIC relocated. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/06/2025

Wood is used in the construction of shelf liner in the meat cutting area. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. PIC removed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/06/2025

The following non-food contact surfaces have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris: - produce and meat prep tables - retail coolers - meat display unit - walk-in cooler fans New Violation. Correct By: 11/06/2025
The ceiling tiles in the produce cutting area is in poor repair (missing tiles). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 11/06/2025

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed behind throughout establishment. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 12/31/2025

Raw animal foods were not stored properly to prevent cross-contamination. Except when combined as ingredients, different types of raw animal foods must be separated from each other during storage by using separate equipment or arrranging each type of food in equipment so that cross contamination of one type with another is prevented. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/02/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (meat cutter) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/03/2024
Food was observed stored on the floor throughout establishment. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 07/02/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the following have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. 1. Produce Case 2. Meat Case 3. Egg Case 4. Produce Containers (black residue) 5. Freezer 6. Produce Shelving 7. Dry Storage Shelving New Violation. Correct By: 07/16/2024
The dumpster area has an accumulation of litter, leaf litter, and debris. The dumpster area must be maintained clean to prevent harborage for pests. New Violation. Correct By: 07/16/2024

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed throughout establishment. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 07/16/2024

The floors and walls throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 07/16/2024
